title: Bridge Essay: Optogenetics in taste research: A decade of enlightenment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Optogenetics in taste research: Adecade of enlightenment.** — Oral Dis. PMID: 36620868. DOI: 10.1111/odi.14498. The electrophysiological function of the tongue involves complicated activities in taste sense, producing the perceptions of salty, sweet, bitter, and sour. However, therapies and prevention of taste loss arising from dysfunction in electrophysiological activity require further fundamental research. Optogenetics has revolutionized neuroscience and brought the study of sensory system to ahigher level in taste. The year 2022 marks adecade of developments of optogenetics in taste since this techn
